name: functions
description: Cloud Functions for AI Virtual Assistant (agent + Instagram publisher)

scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.seed:agents:emulator: npm run build && FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080 node lib/seed/seed-agents.js
scripts.seed:pricing:emulator: npm run build && FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=localhost:8080 node lib/seed/seed-pricing.js
scripts.seed:all: npm run seed:agents && npm run seed:pricing
